reasoning: Order #000000515 is marked Complete with the item shipped and fully paid ($166.36), but there is no visible shipment detail such as carrier, tracking number, or delivery confirmation on the order view. The customer reports non-receipt, and payment was made via Check/Money Order, which complicates immediate refund processing. Before issuing a credit memo, shipment records and proof of delivery must be verified (carrier, tracking, delivery status) or a claim filed with the shipper. Escalating to logistics/fulfillment for investigation is required.
